description: Tasks that require physical presence to verify business information, locations, or conditions

tasks.title: Verify Restaurant Hours - Mario's Pizza Downtown
tasks.description: Visit Mario's Pizza at 123 Main St and confirm their current operating hours. Take a photo of their posted hours sign and verify if they're actually open during posted times. Note any discrepancies from online listings.

evidence_schema.description: Photo of posted hours sign
Confirmed operating hours and current status (open/closed)

tasks.title: Check if Construction Site is Active - Oak Street Bridge
tasks.description: Visit the Oak Street Bridge construction project and verify if work is currently ongoing. Document worker presence, active equipment, and progress since last month. Useful for traffic planning and project tracking.

evidence_schema.description: Photo of construction site with GPS coordinates
Activity level: none/light/moderate/heavy construction activity

tasks.title: Confirm Business Closure - Tech Repair Shop
tasks.description: TechFix Repair at 456 Elm Ave appears closed based on online reviews. Visit location to confirm if permanently closed, temporarily closed, or relocated. Check for forwarding signs or contact information.

evidence_schema.description: Storefront showing current status
Status: open/temporarily closed/permanently closed/relocated

tasks.title: Verify ATM Functionality - First National Bank
tasks.description: Check if the ATM at First National Bank (789 Pine St) is working properly. Test basic functions like balance inquiry if possible, note any out-of-order signs, and verify cash availability indicator.

evidence_schema.description: ATM screen showing operational status
Functional status and any error messages

tasks.title: Count Available Parking Spaces - City Mall
tasks.description: Count the number of available parking spaces in the City Mall parking garage (Level 2) between 2-4 PM on a weekday. Document peak usage patterns for mall management planning.

evidence_schema.description: Overview photo of parking level
Count of available spaces and total spaces
Time of count and occupancy percentage

tasks.title: Verify New Store Opening - Organic Grocery Co
tasks.description: Organic Grocery Co is supposed to open this week at 321 Market St. Confirm if they're open for business, check their hours, and note what products they carry (focus on local/organic items).

evidence_schema.description: Store entrance and any grand opening signs
Opening status, hours, and brief product overview

tasks.title: Check Playground Equipment Safety - Riverside Park
tasks.description: Inspect the children's playground at Riverside Park for any obvious safety issues. Look for broken equipment, sharp edges, or hazardous conditions. This helps maintain safe recreational spaces.

evidence_schema.description: General playground overview
Any safety concerns or damaged equipment
Safety assessment: safe/minor concerns/major concerns with details

tasks.title: Confirm Bus Stop Schedule Accuracy - Route 42
tasks.description: Check if the posted schedule at the Route 42 bus stop (corner of 5th and Broadway) matches actual bus arrival times. Document 3-4 bus arrivals during morning rush hour.
tasks.location_hint: Corner of 5th St and Broadway, Bus Stop #1847

evidence_schema.description: Posted bus schedule
Scheduled vs actual arrival times for 3-4 buses

tasks.title: Verify Trail Condition - Mountain View Hiking Trail
tasks.description: Hike the first 0.5 miles of Mountain View Trail and report on path conditions. Note any fallen trees, erosion, or accessibility issues. Helps park maintenance prioritize repairs.
tasks.location_hint: Mountain View Trail entrance, State Park Area

evidence_schema.description: Trail entrance with GPS marker
Any trail hazards or maintenance issues
Trail condition summary and difficulty level

tasks.title: Check Loading Zone Compliance - Delivery District
tasks.description: Monitor the 30-minute loading zone on Commerce Ave (between 2nd and 3rd St) during peak hours. Document any violations or misuse by non-commercial vehicles.

evidence_schema.description: Loading zone signage
Current usage of loading zone
Compliance level and types of vehicles using zone
